requires: gh >= 2.94 for native issue types / sub-issues / dependencies
notes: Issue body, labels, assignees, and issue type are set on the issue; size/priority/stage/pm_id/spec_url are set as GitHub Project custom fields per config.github.fields. Native --type/--add-parent/--add-blocked-by need gh >= 2.94; older gh degrades to labels + a body note (with a warning).
